creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
The graphics/cimg port fails to build if the DOCS option is disabled, say, via "make config":

[mandree@freeryzen /usr/ports/graphics/cimg]$ make pretty-print-config
-DOCS +EXAMPLES 
[mandree@freeryzen /usr/ports/graphics/cimg]$ make
===>  cimg-3.4.0,3 need to specify xorg modules with USE_XORG.
*** Error code 1
